sentence: Company A shall file report within 30 days.
expected_dcec: HoldsAt(Obligated(frm:4d3e2159b5894389), t) :- true, not(false), TemporalGuard(tmp:d0f22920d2410c6f, t).
expected_tdfol: forall t. (true and TemporalGuard(tmp:d0f22920d2410c6f, t) and not (false)) -> O_t(Act_38d25bf5ed(ent:b07a3f60ed185ffa, t)).

sentence: Company A shall not dump waste.
expected_tdfol: forall t. (true and true and not (false)) -> F_t(Act_43ab82618d(ent:b07a3f60ed185ffa, t)).

sentence: Agency may disclose notice when authorized.
expected_dcec: HoldsAt(Permitted(frm:fba70b3b15d66a32), t) :- activation_clause(when authorized.), not(false), true.
expected_tdfol: forall t. (activation_clause(when authorized.) and true and not (false)) -> P_t(Act_0f290e2c02(ent:8c886bd360b01796, t)).
